rationale: Review 2 would lead to the better placement: the shown declarations are generic Hopf/bialgebra convolution infrastructure and the diff confirms they do not depend on algebraic-group objects, so splitting them under Bialgebra/HopfAlgebra is more material than only privatizing one helper. I could not confirm the PR-description claim about `antipodeAlgHom` from the diff, so that finding is not decisive.
